description: 9 - 23-12-2024 - Emails between lan Collard (former Chief Property & Security Officer, FCDO) and others
text:
others

From: lan Collard PERSONAL

Sent: Mon 23/12/2024 10:40:23 AM (UTC)

To: JCS | Personal ]

Subject: Re: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD

OF MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS

To note, he plans to be using KCS from early Jan (he’s taking the Fox Room as an office for the
month of Jan). So would be good to resolve ASAP (so we don’t end up with an awkward access
issue!).

Tan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: | Personal

From: JCS
Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 10:39:11 AM
To: lan Collard *
Subject: RE: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF MISSION ROLE
OVERSEAS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

lan
Yes will do.

JCS

JCS | Head of Personnel Security Team

Cluster 4 Security, Estates Security and Resilence Department, ESND
Personal | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, King Charles St|
London | SW1A 2AH
Telephone: Mobile: Personal | email: Personal

A-Z Guidance - Developed Vetting (DV) and Security Check (SC) clearances
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Ian Collard *
Sent: 23 December 2024 10:17
To: JCS
Subject: Re: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF
MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

23

I definitely wouldn’t overrule you. You’re the expert!
Gerard messaged me at the end of last week to say:
“I did tell Rochelle [Fisher, HRD] if/if the candidate was HoL [House of Lords], no 
SC/DV required (also confirmed by Cabinet Office). STRAP at the discretion of 
”
Could you check with GSG and see what they say?
If GSG have erred, then I’m happy for you to correct them on his status as a HOM.
Ian Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: 
 
Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 10:07:23 AM
To: Ian Collard * 
Subject: RE: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF 
MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Ian
I did consider this –  but the new guidance for PSP, is attached he is a Lord –  but I 
think he comes under “ Public Appointments”  not a DMA as he is not a advisory role. 
Also the PUS office requested the clearance set up?
Happy to be overruled.
 | Head of Personnel Security Team
Cluster 4 Security, Estates Security and Resilence Department, ESND
 | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, King Charles St | 
London | SW1A 2AH
Telephone: Mobile: 
 | email: 
A-Z Guidance - Developed Vetting (DV) and Security Check (SC) clearances
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Ian Collard * 
Sent: 23 December 2024 09:52
To: 
 
Subject: Re: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF 
MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Presume he automatically receives it as a Lord?
Ian Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
***
Personal
Personal
JCS

To: Michael Roberts Personal
Cc: Gerard McGurk Personal >; lan Collard *
Personal JCS Personal ;JCS
Personal

Subject: RE: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

All
pias note | have set Lord Mandelson up for DV under Case ID Personal
JCS | Head of Personnel Security Team
Cluster 4 Security, Estates Security and Resilence Department, ESND
Personal | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, King Charles St |
London | SW1A 2AH
Telephone: Mobile: Personal | email: Personal
A-Z Guidance - Developed Vetting (DV) and Security Check (SC) clearances
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Michael Roberts Personal
Sent: 18 December 2024 21:29
To: Vincent Devine Personal
Ce: Gerard McGurk Personal ; lan Collard *
Personal 5 JCS < Personal = JCS
< Personal > 7
Subject: Re: FAST TRACK DV CLEARANCE REQUIRED FOR HIGH PROFILE HEAD OF
MISSION ROLE OVERSEAS
Vincent hi,
Yes, spoke to Gerard this evening and we're ready to support as necessary.
Michael
On Wed, 18 Dec 2024, 20:58 Vincent Devine, Personal
wrote:
Gerard,
Thanks. Got it. | am not familiar with the FCDO processes, but | assume you will
initiate in the normal way and support the individual in completing their bit of the
process.
Michael,
Once we get the notification, can we have people stood by to take this forward asap.
The SPAD work has shown just how slick this can be when needed.
Grateful - given importance - if you could confirm you get this and are about
tomorrow.
Vv
Vincent Devine

Director General & Government Chief Security Officer
Government Security Function

Cabinet Office

25
